subject: fix(clean): remove dead CSS and dead code from App.css and embeddingService
body:
Remove ~130 lines of dead CSS (query-bar, import-preview, form styles,
detail-checkbox) and ~150 lines of dead code from embeddingService
(single-item embedding functions, auto-embedding subscription system,
unused exports changed to non-exported).

Tags: cln, hygiene, dead-code, css
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch
